somali.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Ku noqo liiska qalabka STEM Lab
somali.how_sharp_or_flat_you_are_aim_for_the_: Inta aad sarreyso ama hooseyso. Bartilmaameedso aagga cagaaran ee dhexe (±10 cents).
somali.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Dhawaaqa codkaaga muddada, oo lagu sawiray codadka muusikada. Cagaaran = sax, jaalle = u dhow, guduud = cod-khaldan.
somali.piano_roll_showing_pitch_history_green: Piano roll oo muujinaya taariikhda dhawaaqa codka. Xariiqda cagaaran waxay muujinaysaa heeso sax ah (gudaha 10 cents), jaalle u dhow (gudaha 25 cents), guduud cod-khaldan (in ka badan 25 cents).
somali.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Guji cod si aad u maqasho dhawaaqa. Isku day inaad ku waafajiso codkaaga!
somali.a_tone_plays_match_it_with_your_voice_: Dhawaaq baa dhaca — ku waafaji codkaaga! Hay dhawaaqa saxda ah hal ilbiriqsi. Dhibcaha waxay ku saleysan yihiin xawaaraha.
somali.sing_this_note_and_hold_it_within_10_c: Hees codkan oo ku hay gudaha 10 cents hal ilbiriqsi
somali.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Tani waxay ku hagaysaa helitaanka codadkaaga ugu hooseeya iyo ugu sarreeya ee raaxada leh. Hubi in makarafoonku shaqaynayo.
somali.sing_your_lowest_comfortable_note: Hees codkaaga ugu hooseeya ee raaxada leh
somali.hold_the_note_steady_for_about_1_secon: Ku hay codka si degan qiyaastii hal ilbiriqsi.
somali.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: Hadda hees codkaaga ugu sarreeya ee raaxada leh
somali.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: Waxaa lagu qiyaasay codkaaga ugu hooseeya — nooca codka dhabta ah wuxuu sidoo kale ku xiran yahay xadka raaxada leh (tessitura) iyo midabka codka, ee ma aha xadka oo keliya.
somali.restart_vocal_range_test: Dib u bilaw tijaabada xadka codka
somali.piano_keyboard_showing_vocal_range_use: Kiiboodhka biyaano oo muujinaya xadka codka. Isticmaal furayaasha fallaadha bidix/midig si aad ugu socoto codadka, Enter ama Space si aad u ciyaarto.
somali.start_singing_a_sustained_note: Bilaw inaad heesto cod muddo dheer socda.
somali.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Kala duwanaansho dhawaaq oo aad u yar. Wanaagsan isku-darka kooxda heesta!
somali.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Heerka vibrato wuxuu ka sarreeyaa 8 Hz. Isku day inaad nasato oo aad hoos u dhigto.
somali.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Heerka vibrato wuxuu ka hooseeyaa 4 Hz. Isku day inaad tamar geliso socodka hawadaada.
somali.vibrato_width_exceeds_100_cents_try_fo: Ballaca vibrato wuxuu ka badan yahay 100 cents. Bartilmaameedso ruxmad cidhiidhi ah.
somali.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Qurux! Heerka iyo qoto-dheerida waxay ku jiraan xadka ugu fiican.
somali.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Ku dhowaad waad gaadhay! Bartilmaameedso heerka 5-7 Hz iyo qoto-dheerida 30-80 cents.
somali.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Hay cod aan vibrato lahayn. Ku celceli xakameynta codkaaga si aad u hayso si degan oo dhammaystiran.
somali.sustain_a_note_and_let_your_natural_vi: Hay cod oo u ogolow vibrato-kaaga dabiiciga ah inuu soo baxo. Ha ku qasbin — nasato oo u ogolow inuu dhaco.
somali.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Isku day inaad ku ruxmato safka 6 Hz (6 ruxmad ilbiriqsigii). Fiiri akhrinta heerka.
somali.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Isku day inaad ku hayso qoto-dheerida vibrato qiyaastii 50 cents. Aan aad u ballaadhnayn, aan aad u cidhiidhi ahayn.
somali.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Hay cod si aad u aragto qaabka vibrato-kaaga. Xariiqda dhexe waa dhawaaqa codkaaga celceliska ah.
somali.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Raadka qaabka mowjadda vibrato oo muujinaya leexashada dhawaaqa codka muddada
somali.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Qoraalka xariiqda muusikada oo muujinaya tixraaca, bartilmaameedka, iyo codkaaga hadda
somali.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Baadh sida jidhkaagu u sameeyo dhawaaqa. Guji goob si aad wax uga barato, ama socodsii sawir-gacmeedyada si aad u aragto isagoo shaqeynaya.
somali.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Jaantuska goynta sagittal ee dariiqa codka ee bini'aadamka. Isticmaal furayaasha fallaadha bidix/midig si aad ugu socoto goobaha, Enter ama Space si aad u dooratid.
somali.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Fahamka xaaladahan wuxuu kaa caawiyaa inaad aqoonsato calaamadaha digniinta goor hore. Haddii aad qabto astaamo joogto ah, la tashii dhakhtar.
somali.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Macluumaadkani waa waxbarasho oo keliya. Ma aha talo caafimaad. Haddii aad ka welwelsan tahay codkaaga, la tashii dhakhtarka dhega-san-cune ama takhasusiyaha hadalka.
somali.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Hel talooyin caafimaad cod oo shakhsiyeysan oo ku habboon heerkaaga fasalka.
somali.breathe_deep_into_your_belly_diaphragm: Si qoto dheer u neefso caloosha (xijaabka neefta), ee ma aha laabta.
somali.keep_your_core_engaged_to_control_airf: Ku hay muruqyadaada dhexe inay shaqeeyaan si aad u xakameyso socodka hawada intii aad heesayso.
somali.let_the_air_flow_smoothly_and_evenly_t: U ogolow hawada inay si siman oo joogto ah ugu dhex socoto xarkahaaga codka.
somali.feet_shoulder_width_apart_weight_balan: Cagaha ballaca garabka, miisaanka si siman u dheelitiran
somali.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Garbaha oo nasan oo dib loo laabay (ma aha foororsan)
somali.chin_level_not_tilted_up_or_down: Garka simman — ma aha kor ama hoos u janjeedhsan
somali.jaw_relaxed_and_slightly_dropped_when_: Daanka oo nasan oo yara hoos u dhacaya intii aad heesayso
somali.avoid_locking_knees_tensing_neck_or_cl: Iska ilaali: qufulida jilbaha, adkaynta luqunta, ama isku-riixida daanka
somali.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Akhri codadka ku yaal xariiqda muusikada oo si isku xigta u hees. Ogaanshaha dhawaaqa codka waqtiga dhabta ah wuxuu hubiyaa saxsanaantaada.
somali.sing_5_intervals_correctly: Hees 5 farqi cod si sax ah
somali.pitch_training_vocal_range_vibrato_int: Tababarka dhawaaqa codka, xadka codka, vibrato, iyo heesta farqiga codka
somali.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Ku hees makarafoonka; shaybaadhku wuxuu la socdaa inta-jeer waqtiga dhabta ah. Heesaayaasha la tababaray waxay ku hayaan dhawaaqa codka gudaha ±5 cents (1/20 nuska-codka) — sidan ayuu u dhawaaqaa cod-waafajin dhammaystiran.
somali.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Codadka aan la tababarin badankood waxay ku fidaan 1.5-2 oktaf; heesaayaasha caadiga ah ee la tababaray waxay gaadhaan 3 ama in ka badan. Ballaadhinta xadka waxay inta badan ku saabsan tahay isku-darka rejistarrada, ee ma aha oo keliya jiidista kor iyo hoos.
somali.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato caafimaad qaba: ruxmad 5-7 Hz, oo leh ballac ~60-100 cents. Ka gaabis ah = ruxid; ka dhakhso badan = gariir. Vibrato waa shaqada taageerada neefsashada oo nasan, ee ma aha farsamo gaar ah.
somali.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Saddexaadka weyn iyo saddexaadka yar waa labada farqi ee ugu wareersan bilaabayaasha. Calaamadaha xusuusta: saddexaadka weyn = "Oh when the saints", saddexaadka yar = "Greensleeves". Waxay dhistaa dhegaysi la xiriira.
somali.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Ruxmada bushimaha + sireeno ka hor hees kasta oo muddo dheer socota. 5-10 daqiiqo kululayn xoog-yar ah waxay hoos u dhigtaa khatarta isticmaalka xad-dhaafka ah ee xarkaha codka kalabar. Ka boodista kululaynta waa sababta lambar 1 ee dhaawacyada codka ee laga hortagi karo.
somali.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) way ka fiican tahay magacyada xarfaha akhrinta qoraalka sababtoo ah shaqallada waxay siraan xiriirrada farqiga codka, ee ma aha oo keliya astaamaha dhawaaqa codka. Do socda way ka fiican tahay do go'an muusikada codka leh.
somali.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Laba slider — furitaanka cunaha iyo kor-u-qaadista dhabxanaha jilicsan — waxay isku daraan afar sifo oo midabka codka ah (hodan, ifaya, diiran, san). Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto: tijaabi, diiwaangeli, oo sharax waxaad ogaato.
somali.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Midabka codka opera / xirfadle. Dhawaaq-celin buuxda.
somali.tight_resonance_often_unintended: Dhawaaq-celin adag. Inta badan aan ula jeedin.
somali.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Sliderro loogu talagalay furitaanka cunaha, kor-u-qaadista dhabxanaha jilicsan. Kala-saarid gaar ah oo leh 4 midab cod. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto.
somali.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Male-awaal: Hagaajinta qaab-dhismeedka jidhka kee ayaa soo saara midab cod hodan ah?
somali.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Maxay heesaayaasha caadiga ah u kor u qaadaan dhabxanaha?
somali.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Sidee furitaanka cunuhu u saameeyaa taxanaha codka sare?
somali.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Sharax sida qaabka godka dhawaaq-celinta u xakameeyo midabka codka.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad gaar ah oo 4 midab cod ah; dhibco akustik ma jiraan; daah-furid ma jirto — si ula kac ah.
